description: The Greenode Command Line Interface is a unified tool to manage your Greenode (VNG Cloud) services.
help_usage: Use *grn command help* for information on a specific command. The synopsis for each command shows its parameters and their usage. Optional parameters are shown in square brackets.

endpoint-url.help: Override command's default URL with the given URL.

no-verify-ssl.help: By default, the Greenode CLI uses SSL when communicating with Greenode services. For each SSL connection, the CLI will verify SSL certificates. This option overrides the default behavior of verifying SSL certificates.

query.help: A JMESPath query to use in filtering the response data.

profile.help: Use a specific profile from your credential file.

region.help: The region to use. Overrides config/env settings.

cli-read-timeout.help: The maximum socket read time in seconds. If the value is set to 0, the socket read will be blocking and not timeout. The default value is 30 seconds.

cli-connect-timeout.help: The maximum socket connect time in seconds. If the value is set to 0, the socket connect will be blocking and not timeout. The default value is 30 seconds.
